title: Sui network temporarily stalls again after Thursday's outage
summary: The outage was caused by the same network update software bug that disrupted the protocol on Thursday, which resulted in nearly six hours of downtime.

title: Coinbase brings global crypto derivatives markets to US institutional clients
summary: The exchange's integration with Deribit gives eligible US institutional investors access to global crypto options and perpetual futures markets.

title: S&P 500 Powers Historic Weekly Run on US-Iran Bets: Markets Wrap
summary: Hopes that a ceasefire deal could pave the way for an end to the Iran conflict drove stocks to a historic streak of weekly gains, with the market also buoyed by the artificial-intelligence trade.

title: US Stocks Extend Win Streak on Peace Deal Hopes, AI Excitement
summary: Stocks climbed on Friday to close at a fresh record, boosted by hopes of a peace deal with Iran and expectations that spending on artificial intelligence will continue propelling corporate earnings growth.

title: Coinbase Becomes First US Exchange Allowed to Offer Global Crypto Perps Trading
summary: Coinbase can offer U.S. customers access to offshore crypto perpetual futures, a risky form of leveraged crypto trading, the CFTC said Friday.

title: Lenovo Stock Doubles in May on AI Server Boom—Best Month in 27 Years
summary: The world's biggest PC maker surged 109% in May after AI revenue hit 38% of quarterly sales. Goldman Sachs more than doubled its target.

title: US has seized nearly $1 billion in crypto from Iran, Bessent says
summary: Earlier this year, Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the U.S. had seized "nearly $500 million" in Iranian crypto assets.

summary: Dimon said Coinbase's Armstrong is spending hundreds of millions of dollars trying to get Clarity Act passed.
